expectations.text: Six actionables files written, one per ticket in data-driven-overhaul (01 through 06)
expectations.evidence: Six files written under .scratch/data-driven-overhaul/actionables/ (01 through 06) and copied to workspace outputs.

expectations.text: All six filenames match the pattern NN-slug--actionables.md
expectations.evidence: All six filenames use the '--actionables.md' suffix (e.g. 01-timeouts-and-caps-knobs--actionables.md).

expectations.text: Each file maps its ticket's ACs to steps and verification rows
expectations.evidence: Each file follows the actionables template (T1 with-skill grading confirmed 8/8 expectations; T3 files follow the same template).

expectations.text: Every File path across all six files exists in the ACE repo at run time
expectations.evidence: Agent's VERIFY report: 'All source paths cited in the steps were confirmed live this run'; VERIFY items are test paths the tickets name that don't exist (flagged in Open Questions, not faked).

expectations.text: Cross-ticket dependencies are noted ('Blocked by: None' for 01/02/03, '03' for 04/05/06)
expectations.evidence: Index table in chat return lists blocked-by column showing 03 as blocker for tickets 04, 05, 06; chat explicitly notes '03 is the frontier that unblocks 04/05/06'.

expectations.text: Chat response includes an index table: ticket, mode, file path, blocked-by, ready
expectations.evidence: Subagent return includes a 6-row markdown table with exactly those columns.
